textByHash.7a742ceb3607e6e2f82f3a7798448e606c3ce141: Rock. This here is Stonecutter Outpost. We get rock, cut it, then sell it.
textByHash.bbe38c4af57b72aa8e96119bb97f638c9d39a8c6: What? No. We go back to Cam Torum sometimes, but this is home.
textByHash.bcc4172ec5d253fcf0a3af83ad3f6583ba2cda8a: Then why you keep staring? Get gone!
